title: No School Tomorrow!
lyrics:
[verse 1]
I slid off my chair—*splat!*
Milk went flying—*crash!*
Clock went ding-ding-ding!
Mom yelled, "No school—*gasp!*"

[chorus]
No school tomorrow!
Spin and jump and borrow
All the fun we can!
No school tomorrow!

[verse 2]
PJs flip like wings!
I bounce like jumping things!
Floor’s my trampoline!
Watch me twirl so clean!

[chorus]
No school tomorrow!
Spin and jump and borrow
All the fun we can!
No school tomorrow!

[ending]
Now my toes feel light,
Eyes feel oh so tight,
Night-night, sleep so bright!
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, full musical production, piano, bass, and claps, 118 BPM, super bouncy, high energy, strong groove, clear warm vocal, strong singalong chorus, every word easy to understand
scene: The kitchen clock strikes 7:17 PM when Mom hangs up the phone, and you leap off the linoleum in sock feet, knocking over your half-finished glass of milk—"NO SCHOOL TOMORROW!"—spinning so hard your dinosaur pajama pants flare like a tutu.
cover_description: Kid in dinosaur PJs mid-spin, milk puddle spreading, clock glowing 7:17.
